creator: jseger@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Unfortunately, this port is very out of date and will not work on a current 
system.  It also refers to a distfile which is no longer available. 
I'm sorry that no one committed this while it was still valid. 

If you are still interested, I'd encourage you to update the port and resubmit 
it.
